description: You are a medical scientist validating PCR primers for a diagnostic assay targeting the human insulin gene. Simulate PCR amplification using the human insulin gene (~/UGENE_Data/human_insulin_gene.gb) and the primers provided in ~/UGENE_Data/pcr_primers.txt. Configure the simulation for 0 mismatches and a maximum product size of 1000 bp. Export the predicted amplicon sequence to ~/UGENE_Data/pcr_results/amplicon.fasta and the annotated gene to ~/UGENE_Data/pcr_results/insulin_pcr_annotated.gb. Document the results in a report at ~/UGENE_Data/pcr_results/pcr_validation_report.txt, including the primer sequences, whether amplification occurred, the amplicon's start/end positions and length, and a conclusion on diagnostic suitability.
